CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Atty. Shaana A. Rahman, Esquire appearing for the Plaintiff Maria Guadalupe Rios. Plaintiff maria Guadalupe Rios was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court took the matter under submission.
Counsel submitted a propose judgment. (Damages-$1,031,375.92, Atty's fee- 0; Punitive Damage- $1,000,000 were presented in court)
